name: Percentage Calculator

seo.title: Percentage Calculator — 4 Modes, Free & Instant
seo.description: Four percentage calculators in one: find % of a number, calculate % change, determine what % X is of Y, or adjust a value by any percentage. Free.

acceptedAnswer.text: A percentage is a ratio expressed as a fraction of 100. For example, 25% means 25 out of every 100.

mainEntity.name: How do I find what percent X is of Y?

acceptedAnswer.text: Divide X by Y and multiply by 100. Example: 30 is what % of 120? → (30 ÷ 120) × 100 = 25%.

mainEntity.name: How do I calculate percentage change?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use the formula: ((New − Old) ÷ |Old|) × 100. A positive result is an increase; a negative result is a decrease.
Multiply Y by X and divide by 100. Example: What is 15% of 200? → (15 ÷ 100) × 200 = 30.

mainEntity.name: How do I increase a number by a percentage?

acceptedAnswer.text: Multiply the number by (1 + percentage ÷ 100). Example: 500 increased by 20% → 500 × 1.20 = 600.

mainEntity.name: How do I decrease a number by a percentage?

acceptedAnswer.text: Multiply the number by (1 − percentage ÷ 100). Example: 500 decreased by 20% → 500 × 0.80 = 400.
